title: 🖌️ Thematic
description: A fresh take on Minecraft-friendly furniture!
body:
Adds furniture and decoration blocks for a trio of categories!

![All items](https://cdn.mcbrawls.net/img/thematic/all_items_1.0.png)

## Decorator's Table

![Decorator's Table Crafting](https://cdn.mcbrawls.net/img/thematic/decorator_table_crafting.png)

![Decorator's Table Sunken Seat](https://cdn.mcbrawls.net/img/thematic/decorators_table_craft_ox_seat.png)

## Default Decorating Blocks

### Seat

![Seat Craft](https://cdn.mcbrawls.net/img/thematic/seat_craft.png)

### Gate

![Gate Craft](https://cdn.mcbrawls.net/img/thematic/gate_craft.png)

## Themes

- Rustic Theme
    - Item found in Abandoned Mineshafts, Pillager Outposts, Woodland Mansions.
- Sunken Theme
    - Item found in Shipwrecks, Buried Treasure, Underwater Ruins.
- Mechanical Theme
    - Item found in Jungle Temples, Dungeons, Strongholds.
